---
name: Hypothesis thread
about: Track a falsifiable hypothesis or inquiry thread
title: "[Hypothesis] "
labels: hypothesis
---

## Hypothesis

State in falsifiable form. See `docs/METHODOLOGY.md`.

## Prior work

Links to literature, prior issues, or `methods/` protocols.

## Predictions and tests

What measurable outcomes would support or refute this? Link data or script paths when present.

## Status

- [ ] exploratory
- [ ] under active test
- [ ] superseded / retired (link follow-up)

## Notes

Optional: scope boundaries from `docs/VISION_AND_SCOPE.md`, collaborators, deadlines.
